overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage showing a character with a backpack and weapons walking through a post-apocalyptic rural mountain setting. The character traverses from an open field past abandoned wooden structures, along a dirt valley path, and onto a paved mountain road with snow-capped peaks visible in the distance.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through tall grass toward a dirt path, carrying a large backpack with weapons strapped to it

entered.detail: weathered wooden barn structure with broken windows and faded paint
tall mountain peak with snow visible on the summit against blue sky
unpaved walking path cutting through the grassy field
tall evergreen tree with dense foliage

segments.scene_description: The character begins walking through an open grassy field with an abandoned wooden farmhouse visible to the left. Snow-capped mountains rise in the distant background as the character approaches and steps onto a winding dirt trail.

scene_state.functional_zone: enclosed mountain valley with rocky cliffs

events.description: path enters a more enclosed valley with rocky cliffs rising on both sides

agents.ego_description: continuing along the dirt path through the narrowing valley between rock faces

entered.detail: steep rock face with sparse vegetation covering the slope
tall rocky outcrop with pine trees growing at the base

segments.scene_description: The trail winds through an increasingly enclosed mountain valley, with steep rocky cliffs and dense pine forest lining both sides of the path. The abandoned structures are left behind as the character descends deeper into the wilderness terrain.

scene_state.functional_zone: paved mountain road with warning signs

events.description: dirt trail transitions to paved asphalt road with yellow curve warning sign visible

agents.ego_description: walking along the paved road following the curve of the valley

entered.detail: asphalt road with double yellow lines marking the center
yellow diamond-shaped road sign indicating a curve ahead

segments.scene_description: The dirt trail gives way to a paved asphalt road marked with yellow curve warning signs. The character continues walking through the mountain valley, with rocky cliffs on the left and forested slopes on the right, heading toward the distant snow-capped peak.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from an open rural field into a narrow mountain valley that eventually opens onto a paved road. It begins with the character walking through a grassy expanse past an abandoned wooden farmhouse, with snow-capped mountains looming in the far distance. As the character steps onto a winding dirt trail, the environment shifts into an enclosed valley characterized by steep rocky cliffs and dense pine forests. The scene then transitions as the dirt path gives way to a paved asphalt road marked with yellow curve warning signs. Finally, the camera continues forward through the rugged terrain of cliffs and forested slopes, heading directly toward the distant snowy peak.
